name: task_create
description: Create a new structured task. Tasks support hierarchical decomposition via parent_task_id, typed context sources for gathering relevant data, dependency ordering, and priority-based scheduling. The task starts in the 'defining' state and must be transitioned through its lifecycle.

title.description: Brief, descriptive title for the task

description.description: Detailed description of what needs to be accomplished

parent_task_id.description: ID of the parent task if this is a subtask, enabling hierarchical task decomposition

priority.description: Task priority level for scheduling and ordering

data.description: Typed context data specific to the source type

context_sources.description: Array of typed context sources to attach to the task at creation time

dependencies.description: Array of task IDs that must be completed before this task can start

estimated_duration.description: Estimated time to complete (e.g., '30 minutes', '2 hours', '1 day')

deadline.description: Optional deadline for task completion in ISO 8601 format

metadata.description: Additional task-specific data or context as key-value pairs

parameters.title: Investigate API latency spike
parameters.description: Investigate the root cause of the 3x latency increase on the /api/search endpoint observed since last deployment

parameters.title: Write unit tests for auth module refactor
parameters.description: Create comprehensive unit tests covering the new OAuth2 flow, token refresh logic, and error handling paths
